flow.rental-creation.start.tips.descript:
To import your listing from Airbnb, connect your account(s).

If you don’t have an Airbnb account, follow the manual flow to create your rental.
flow.rental-creation.start.tips.title: Choose how to create your rental
flow.rental-creation.name.tips.title: Write a catchy rental name
flow.rental-creation.name.tips.content:
Make your rental’s name attractive and descriptive enough while keeping it relatively short.

E.g.:
- Bright apartment with view
- Cozy villa with swimming pool
flow.rental-creation.header.title: Create rental
flow.rental-creation.name.heading: What is the name of your rental?
flow.rental-creation.name.subheading: Stand out with an eye-catching rental name that highlights the best of your place.
flow.rental-creation.description.heading: How would you describe your place?
flow.rental-creation.description.subhead: Go ahead and write a quick summary of your property, highlight the main amenities and attractions nearby. This description will be visible on your Lodgify website, and you can always change it in your Rental Settings.
flow.rental-creation.description.tips.co:
Use the description to add more detailed information about your rental.

Let your guests know about things to do nearby and how they can make the most of their stay.
flow.rental-creation.capacity.heading: How many guests can stay in your rental?
flow.rental-creation.capacity.subheading: Indicate the number of guests your rental can fit comfortably.
flow.rental-creation.rates.heading: What is the price per night?
flow.rental-creation.rates.subheading: Set the default price for each night and the associated currency.
channel-manager.channel-page.airbnb.desc: Connect your Airbnb account to request syncing of your listings
flow.rental-creation.booking-request.hea: How would you like to accept reservations?
flow.rental-creation.booking-request.sub: Choose how you want to accept reservations for this rental
flow.rental-creation.booking-request.ins: You accept reservations instantly without requiring your prior approval.
flow.rental-creation.booking-request.boo: You only accept reservations after your review and approval.
channels-manager.slider.contact-us-foote: Contact us in order to change the configuration of the connection.
channels-manager.slider.footer-contact-u: Contact us for any question
channel-manager.modal.need-to-upgrade: In order to connect to your preferred channel you MUST assign rentals to your website and purchase one of our web hosting subscriptions.
channel-manager.slider.link-list.no-rent: No rentals have been mapped yet. Complete the form to provide data for the mapping.
channel-manager.slider.title-channels-fi: Fill the form to send the right data for the mapping
flow.header.tip.heading: Tips
channel-manager.slider.vrbo-description: The Vrbo integration enables you to connect via a full two-way API with all the Vrbo family channels. It ensures that your calendar and rates on Vrbo are always up-to-date in real-time. It also instantly imports your HA reservations (with all details) into Lodgify and allows you to use our credit card gateways to directly charge those reservations.
channel-manager.ical.instructions: Currently some channels do not have the function to import their Reservation Details into Lodgify. If you only want to import unavailable calendar entries of this channel into Lodgify, you can use our iCal tool
channel-manager.ical.export-calendar.too: You need to copy & paste the iCal URL into your {channelName}'s calendar for each Rental.
channel-manager.slider.booking.descripti: The integration with Booking.com works 2-way, therefore, the reservations will be imported with all the details, the availability will always be up to date and you’ll be able to export the rates from Lodgify to Booking.com
channel-manager.slider.expedia.descripti: The Expedia integration allows you to connect and manage your Expedia reservations directly through your Lodgify account. By activating this integration, you'll ensure that Expedia is always up-to-date with your calendar availability and with the rates you define for your rentals in Lodgify. You will also be able to receive, manage, and charge any reservations from Expedia directly through our reservation system.
channel-manager.slider.vrbo.description: The Vrbo integration enables you to connect via a full two-way API with all the Vrbo family channels. It ensures that your calendar and rates on Vrbo are always up-to-date in real-time. It also instantly imports your HA reservations (with all details) into Lodgify and allows you to use our credit card gateways to directly charge those reservations.
channel-manager.slider.ical.description: iCal allows you to synchronize your Lodgify calendar with external channels, such as HomeAway, TripAdvisor and any other channel that supports iCal.
flow.rental-creation.location.heading: Where is your rental located?
flow.rental-creation.completed.heading: Rental is complete!
flow.rental-creation.completed.subheadin: Your rental is complete. Now you can access advanced customization, edit and add information and connect channels.
flow.rental-creation.location.tips.title: Rental Address
flow.rental-creation.location.tips.conte:
Fill out your rental’s full address.

You can click the current location button if you are currently located at the rental, to fill out the fields automatically.
flow.rental-creation.location.toast-erro: Make sure to include both the street number and zip code.
flow.rental-creation.capacity.tips.title: Need help?
flow.rental-creation.capacity.tips.conte: Get more guidance by browsing our support page.
flow.rental-creation.rates.tips.title: Need help?
flow.rental-creation.rates.tips.content:
Lodgify allows you to set up, modify and control your rates easily.

To get started, we only need your nightly rate. Later, you can add season rates, derived rates, choose minimum stay and assign promotions.

Check rental rates breakdown in our article.
flow.rental-creation.booking-request.tip: Get more guidance by browsing our support page.
channel-manager.channel-page.airbnb.desc: Publish, sync, and manage your Airbnb listings from one place.
channel-manager.channel-page.table.no-re: You don't have rentals in Lodgify

Incomplete rentals won’t be available for synchronization.

⚠️ Check the "Privacy and Settings" page in your Airbnb account and be sure no other App or Channel Manager are already connected.

channel-manager.channel-page.warning-mod: Disconnecting the account will unsychronize all reservations, prices and info for all rentals associated to this account. This cannot be undone.
I understand and acknowledge the consequences.
import.tool.airbnb.header.title: Import rentals
import.tool.airbnb.select.page.tips.desc:
You can import all of your rentals at once.

The imported data are:
title, description, address, photos, amenities, availability settings, reservation settings, blocked periods, cleaning fee.

Get more help by visiting our Support page
flow.rental-creation.photos.heading: What does your rental look like?
flow.rental-creation.photos.subheading: Upload photos to show your place in its best light. You can edit photos anytime in your rental profile. Min size: 50Kb; max size: 16MB; recommended size: 1024 × 683 px.
flow.rental-creation.gallery.tips.title: A picture is worth a thousand words
flow.rental-creation.gallery.tips.conten:
Add photos to showcase your rental and try to follow the following tips:

— Tidy up the rooms
— Use natural daylight and avoid flash
— Use landscape mode and get the widest shot of your rooms
— Highlight special decor and amenities
— Take photos of every room your guests can access
flow.rental-sync.header.title: Sync rental
flow.rental-sync.name.heading: Select & sync
flow.rental-sync.name.subheading: Create a new Airbnb listing or select the Airbnb listing you want to sync with
Upload photos in JPG or PNG format, with a file size between 50KB and 16MB.
flow.rental-sync.select-sync.account.lab: Which Airbnb account do you want to publish the new rental into?
flow.rental-sync.select-sync.sync-everyt: Including prices, availability, content (descriptions, amenities, photos, etc.). Make changes inside Lodgify, and information on Airbnb will update automatically.
flow.rental-sync.select-sync.sync-limite: We'll export only prices and availability; no content synchronization.
flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility.heading: Configure taxes
flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility.subhead: Airbnb automatically assigns tax collection which applies to your listing. See more details about your tax set up below.
flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility.check-s: Airbnb either automatically collects and remits certain taxes or doesn’t collect any taxes in this area. Occupancy taxes are not supported.
I acknowledge that I understand the tax collection scenario.
flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility.do-not-: Do not send taxes to guests
flow.rental-sync.configurations.rate-typ: Apply the default rate (default and season rate) or any assigned derived rate.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.markup.d: Apply a % difference (positive or negative) to the prices synced. Formatting is 0.00%.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.enable-s: Choose to use the primary policy deposit, apply a custom deposit or no deposit.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.security: Enter your security deposit value (needs to be between {min} and {max}).

Entire home, Hotel room, Private room, Shared room. Find out more here
Private room
Shared room
Entire home
flow.rental-sync.configurations.bookabil: Instant booking or Booking request. Find out more here.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.cancella: Choose your Airbnb cancellation policy. Find out more here
flow.rental-sync.configurations.booking-: Set a booking window to prevent guests from booking too far in advance
flow.rental-sync.configurations.advance-: Select how far before midnight on check-in day your guests can book.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.allow-re: Allow request to book during your advance notice period
Allow guests to submit booking requests within your advance notice period.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.preparat: Select the number of days to be blocked before and after each reservation.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.max-nigh: Set the maximum number of days for which your rental can be booked.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.heading: Choose your sync settings
flow.rental-sync.import.heading: Import your Airbnb reservations
flow.rental-sync.import.subheading: Import your existing reservations from Airbnb to Lodgify.
flow.rental-sync.import.publish-status.s: Guests can find your listing in search results and request or book available dates.
flow.rental-sync.import.unpublish-status: Guests won't be able to book your listing or find it in search results. You can list it later using the configuration page.
flow.rental-sync.import.overlapping-book: Some Lodgify events overlap with Airbnb reservations. You can override Lodgify events with Airbnb reservations or ignore them and handle these reservations directly in Airbnb. You won't be able to undo this action.
flow.rental-sync.import.warning-modal.co: If you don’t override any reservation, make sure you manage them manually in Lodgify and other channels.
flow.rental-creation.completed.subheadin:
Your rental is now complete and assigned to your website.
You can already customize your website.
flow.rental-sync.configurations.toast-er: Something went wrong. You can contact our support team for help.

flow.rental-sync.terms-and-conditions.en: Connecting with API will automatically move your account to the new simplified pricing model (read more about this rule and the exceptions).

flow.rental-sync.terms-and-conditions.re: Airbnb API is not available in certain cities/regions. Please check the complete list of restricted locations here.

flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility.check-s: Airbnb automatically collects and remits taxes, but you can add your local taxes set in Lodgify to the default tax value from Airbnb and start remitting taxes yourself. Airbnb will continue to collect and remit your taxes if you choose not to export them.

Airbnb automatically collects and remits taxes for this listing, but you can override it with your local taxes set up in Lodgify. If you choose to override taxes, you will need to remit them yourself. If you choose not to override them, Airbnb will collect and remit the taxes for you.
Airbnb does not collect any taxes, so that you can export your local taxes set in Lodgify to Airbnb. They will apply to all Airbnb reservations under the occupancy taxes and fee section.

flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility-stacked: A state tax that Airbnb must collect and remit is 5%. There is also a city tax of 3%, which Airbnb does not collect and remit. The host specifies an additional occupancy tax value of 3% in Lodgify. Airbnb collects 8% from the guest, pays the 5% state tax, and sends 3% to the host. The host uses that 3% to pay the city tax. The 8% amount will show as a separate line in the Airbnb quote.
flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility-overrid: Airbnb automatically collects and remits a state tax of 5%. However, the listing is subject to taxes that total 7%, so the host uses occupancy taxes to specify a value of 7% in Lodgify. Airbnb collects 7% on top of the room price + cleaning fee from the guest and includes it in the host payout instead. The host then uses the 7% to pay the taxes, and this amount will show as a separate line in the Airbnb quote.
flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility-no_airb: In Lodgify, the host specifies an occupancy tax of 5%. Airbnb collects 5% of the room price + cleaning fee from the guest and includes it in the host payout. This amount will show as a separate line in the Airbnb quote.
flow.rental-sync.tax-eligibility-enabled: Business tax ID is the number that the government issues when it considers that your activity/business complies with laws and regulations. TOT number is a company registration number, but on a federal/country level, and it doesn't exist for all countries. If you don't have it or don't know this number, copy and paste the same value as the Business tax ID. If you don't want to export taxes from Lodgify to Airbnb, there is no need to fill in these fields.

channels.section-description: The Lodgify channel manager connects you to the most important channels on the market. Easily synchronize your calendars to prevent double reservations and enjoy managing rates, messaging and payments from one central platform. Here you can edit your listing settings, increase or decrease your pricing, publish or unpublish listings. Lodgify features both API and iCal integrations.

apps-settings-recaptcha-description: The recaptcha app protects you from bots and spam. It requires your guest to prove that he/she is human (and not a bot) during the booking process in your Lodgify booking engine before he/she can submit a booking request. The recaptcha will only be shown if you do not accept credit cards.
apps.lynx.second-step: In Lynx, go to settings, then integration, click Add integration
apps-settings-lynx-description: Lynx is a smart and secure way to exchange keys between hosts and guests. The solution delivers a virtual key to the guest, valid only for the duration of the stay. Hosts can accept last minute reservations translating into higher occupancy without the risk of key duplication or inconvenience of coordinating with guests.
apps-settings-white-label-description: The White label extension removes the "Powered by Lodgify" label on your website.
apps-settings-seo-reports-description:
Gain more traffic, improve your keywords' ranking and know how your competition is doing. Once you enable the SEO Reports app, you will receive monthly reports describing accurate and insightful stats for your website's keywords performance. Get monthly reports for one of your Lodgify websites including:

Detailed stats about 10 of your chosen keywords.
Key insights about 3 of your chosen competitors.
Detailed stats from any of these major search engines: Google, Bing, Yahoo, Yandex.

flow.rental-sync.price-simulator.listing:
Lodgify nightly price with an extra charge per guest (if applied) and mark up (if set). 
Promotions excluded.
flow.rental-sync.price-simulator.fees.to: A standard fee is a percentage of the nightly price (after all adjustments) or a flat amount per reservation. The room price in the Airbnb quote includes these fees.
flow.rental-sync.price-simulator.subtota: It’s the sum of the listing rate and your rental’s fees
flow.rental-sync.price-simulator.cleanin: Your cleaning fee plus any exclusive VAT applied to the cleaning fee and linen fee (if set up).
flow.rental-sync.price-simulator.taxes.t:
The amount depends on your tax collection model:

  • We add your Lodgify taxes on top of the Airbnb room price and the cleaning fee
  • Your Airbnb taxes are added on top or removed according to your tax collection scenario
flow.rental-sync.price-simulator.airbnb_: We've added your Lodgify taxes on top of the Airbnb room price and cleaning fee
flow.rental-sync.price-simulator.service:
Airbnb calculates guest service fee automatically, and it can be between 0% and 20% of the reservation subtotal.
In some countries, service fee can be higher than 20%, because Airbnb is required to collect VAT on top of its fees. You can find the list of these countries here.
apps-settings-white-label-email-descript: The White label extension for email allows you to use your own domain name for emails sent from within Lodgify. E.g., emails that were normally sent from "owner_1298123ealshd@lodgify.com" will now be sent from "owner_1298123ealshd@your_domain.com"

flow.rental-sync.configurations.bookabil: If you choose the "Booking request" setting, you won't be able to connect this rental with Booking.com, or Expedia and use a different setting ("Instant booking") for Vrbo or Lodgify website

Since you are using "Instant booking" for other channels (Booking.com, Expedia, Vrbo and/or Lodgify CMS), Airbnb bookability setting should be the same.
If you want to use "Booking request" settings for Airbnb:

  • Change bookability settings to "Booking request" on other platforms.
  • Disconnect platforms that do not allow "Booking request".
  • Connect with Airbnb via iCal.

channel-manager.slider.airbnb.descriptio: The Airbnb integration enables you to do a full two-way API integration with Airbnb. It ensures that your calendar and rates on Airbnb are always up-to-date in real-time. It also imports your Airbnb reservations in real-time with all details into Lodgify. Furthermore, it is the recommended app for hosts that accept instant bookings or request to book on Airbnb.

apps.beyond.first-step: Sign in or create an account on Beyond
apps.beyond.second-step: Go to link account page in Beyond. Copy and paste your Lodgify user ID and API key and fill the form in Beyond
apps.beyond.third-step-content: After connecting your account, finalize set up by enabling external rates in Lodgify
apps.beyond.fourth-step-content: The connection is complete. To send your rates to Lodgify, go to Beyond and enable price posting
apps.beyond.note-content: Your minimum stay, LoS, and rates settings must be managed from Beyond. For further information and instructions, please read our knowledge base article.
apps.sliders.beyond-description:
Beyond is a powerful revenue management and dynamic pricing software for vacation and short-term rentals.
Our integration allows you to import your rates and LoS from Beyond to enable smart pricing and increase revenue and optimize occupancy.
apps.sliders.price-labs-description:
PriceLabs is a powerful revenue management and dynamic pricing software for vacation and short-term rentals.
Our integration allows you to import your rates from PriceLabs to enable smart pricing and increase revenue and occupancy.
apps.pricelabs.first-step-content: Select "Connect to your Airbnb / PMS account" and choose Lodgify as your PMS
apps.pricelabs.third-step-content: After connecting your account, enable external rates in Lodgify to finalize the setup
apps.pricelabs.fourth-step-content: To export your rates to Lodgify, go to PriceLabs and click "Sync all"
apps.superhog.fourth-step-content: Click save, then refresh (this may take up to 15 minutes). Reload the page. Tick the properties you want to add to Truvi, then click update.
apps.sliders.superhog-description: Truvi is the leading global digital trust platform for the vacation rental industry. Truvi enables a growing ecosystem of hosts, operators and guests to make their online activity safer, providing a tech-based, AI-supported toolkit including biometric recognition, ID verification, and screening technology.
apps.sliders.lynx-description: Lynx is a smart and secure way to exchange keys between hosts and guests. The solution delivers a virtual key to the guest, valid only for the duration of the stay. Hosts can accept last minute reservations translating into higher occupancy without the risk of key duplication or inconvenience of coordinating with guests.
apps.lynx.fourth-step: Copy and Paste your Lodgify API key in the corresponding field and click “Save”
apps.lynx.fifth-step-content: If the connection is successful, you will see a banner with the integration and the status message “Authorized”
apps.chekin.first-step: Sign in or create an account on CheKin
apps.chekin.first-step-content: Select Lodgify as a PMS/Channel manager when registering
apps.chekin.second-step: Copy and paste your Lodgify API key, then add your desired email and click “Connect With Lodgify”
apps.chekin.third-step-content: If the connection is successful, you will see a banner with the integration and the status message Authorized
apps.sliders.chekin-description: A single solution to resolve the bureaucracy and the legal processes required in the reception of travelers. The technology provides a frictionless and optimized check-in experience for your guests.
apps.sliders.revyoos-description: Revyoos.com is the review aggregator for short-term rentals that helps you gather all guest reviews in one unique digital platform.

apps.sliders.safely-description: Safely is the premier provider of short-term rental protection, offering rigorous guest screening and comprehensive insurance coverage. Our integration with Safely will help bring you confidence and peace of mind as you grow revenue, reduce risk, and provide a better guest experience.

apps.sliders.jervis-description: Jervis Systems is an access management platform that allows you to automate rental property access, through a single app. Jervis Systems automatically creates PIN codes for contactless check-in and property access and offers multiple property entry options including SET Pin Code, text, call, and voice command.

apps.jervis.fourth-step-content: Your assigned devices will create a unique pin entry code for every reservation.
apps.jervis.note-content: Be sure to have a compatible smart lock setup. You can see the list of Supported Devices here.

• Connecting with API will automatically move your account to the new simplified pricing model. This doesn't apply to listings in the USA, Canada, the Bahamas, Mexico, Argentina, Taiwan, and Uruguay. (read more about this rule and the exceptions).
  • The Airbnb smart pricing feature won't be available anymore, and you can edit the prices and availability only inside Lodgify.
  • Make sure your prices and availability are up to date inside Lodgify — we will export them to Airbnb.
  • We will remove closed periods, iCal imports, and manual reservations from Airbnb, so make sure to create them in Lodgify.
  • If you host the listing from an owner and a/some co-hosts accounts in Airbnb, you need to connect all those Airbnb accounts with Lodgify.
  • Airbnb API is not available in certain cities/regions. Please check the complete list of restricted locations here.

rental.operational-placeholders.descript: Here you can create the content of your messaging placeholders for the rental instructions. These auto-populated texts are reusable in any of the notification messages you send to your clients, and they complete the messaging placeholder library Lodgify automatically creates for you (rental name, guest name, etc.).
rental.channel-sync.unconnected.HomeAway:
• You can only connect one Vrbo account per each Lodgify account
  • A VAT number or a registration company number is required for all partners (except the ones based in the US)
  • Set up existing Vrbo listings as pay per booking, or have an active subscription with Vrbo for all the properties
  • We will charge all reservations via Lodgify, so please make sure to activate a payment gateway in your Lodgify account
  • To avoid overbookings, manually create existing reservations or closed periods in Lodgify, as we cannot import them from Vrbo
  • You need to use the currency of the Vrbo master brand (AUD, BRL, CAD, EUR, GBP, JPY, NZD, USD) and set up the same currency in Lodgify
rental.channel-sync.unconnected.title: Get ready to connect
rental.operational-placeholders.tooltip-: Messaging placeholders will come in handy when writing messages, you will be able to insert them into your messaging templates.
They will show in between brackets in your message template, for example:
• Create an account with Expedia and set up your rentals.
  • Make sure you have the same currency set in Lodgify and Expedia.
  • Create weekly prices in Expedia, so our agent can export your Lodgify rates later.
  • You need to use the Occupancy-based Pricing Model in Expedia.
  • Set up taxes, fees, and promotions manually inside Expedia, as we cannot export them from Lodgify.
  • Add rental content (photos, description, amenities, etc) manually inside Expedia, as we cannot export it from Lodgify.
  • To avoid overbookings, manually create existing reservations or closed periods in Lodgify, as we cannot import them from Expedia.
rental.channel-sync.unconnected.BookingC:
• Create an account with Booking.com and set up your rentals
  • Make sure you have the same currency set in Lodgify and Booking.com
  • If you want to offer weekly and monthly prices, create these rates in Booking.com
  • Any flat amount fee (e.g. cleaning, pet, etc.) should be created and managed inside Booking.com
  • We will export all % taxes from Lodgify and show them as part of the room prices in Booking.com

import.airbnb.terms-and-conditions.modal:
• You need to connect Lodgify with your Airbnb account to copy your rentals. However, this does not automatically sync your rentals. If you want to sync them, you can either wait for your onboarding call or request it from the Channel manager page.
  • Keep in mind that there are certain cities/regions that do not allow connection with Airbnb. Check the complete list here.
  • If you are experiencing issues copying your listings, make sure you have added all Airbnb owner/cohost accounts to Lodgify. If you have done so and you are still unable to copy them, please click here to contact our Support team.

• Expect Airbnb to automatically switch your account to the new simplified pricing model after connecting. Learn more here.

  • The connection between Airbnb and Lodgify will be maintained unless you disconnect them.

channel-manager.airbnb.terms-and-conditi:
• Configure your prices and availability correctly in Lodgify; these will be exported to Airbnb.
  • Smart Pricing feature in Airbnb is automatically turned off. All prices must be controlled in Lodgify.
  • Certain cities/regions are restricted, check the list here.

• By connecting your Airbnb account with Lodgify, Airbnb will automatically switch your account to the new simplified pricing model (read more about this rule and the exceptions).
  • Once synced, Airbnb prices and availability need to be edited inside Lodgify only. Ensure your prices and availability are set up correctly inside Lodgify, as rates and availability will be exported from Lodgify to Airbnb.
  • The smart pricing feature in Airbnb will be automatically turned off. All your prices need to be controlled inside your Lodgify account.
  • Make sure that your closed periods, iCal imports, and manual reservations are created in Lodgify as they will be removed from Airbnb.
  • In certain cities/regions you won't be able to sync your rental, please check the complete list of restricted locations here.

  • Keep in mind that there are certain cities/regions that do not allow connection with Airbnb. Check the complete list here.

apps.sliders.enso-description: Enso Connect is a guest experience app that allows you to have better communication with your guests. Using AI technology their software provides a guest sentiment analysis so you can be sure to send the right message to the right people. Set up messaging with custom triggers and keep a record of all your guests with their CRM. Create a digital guidebook to answer all your guest's questions and let them check in smoothly and independently with the boarding pass app.
apps.enso.first-step: Sign up to Enso Connect by scheduling a demo
apps.enso.first-step-content: Enso Connect requires a qualification call to assess your needs before you can sign up
apps.enso.second-step: In your Enso Connect welcome email, click on the “Let’s get you Enso Connected” button
apps.enso.third-step: Select Lodgify from the dropdown menu of PMS partners, copy your Lodgify API key, and paste into the box
apps.enso.fourth-step-content: Make sure to schedule your onboarding calls with Enso Connect so your account manager can help you set up all your workflows.
apps.sliders.tidy-description: TIDY is a cleaning and property maintenance jobs automation app allowing property managers to easily take care of turnovers between guests. Jobs can be set up and scheduled automatically between reservations. TIDY has a network of professionals to whom you can assign jobs or you can add your already known and trusted professionals to assign them jobs. TIDY also allows for the automatic payment of professionals so everything is automated.
apps.tidy.first-step: Sign in or create an account on TIDY
apps.tidy.second-step: Click import properties and select Lodgify from the dropdown list
apps.tidy.third-step: Copy your Lodgify API key and paste into TIDY to link your properties and import your reservations
apps.tidy.fourth-step-content: Select your scheduling preferences on TIDY and automate your turnovers
apps.tidy.note-content: Properties must be located in a country with a zip code to use the software.

billing.faqs.answer.who-is-lodgify-for: Lodgify is designed to help all types of short term rental businesses grow – from 1 property to more than 1000.
billing.faqs.answer.how-much-does-lodgif: Lodgify pricing starts at $11 per month and varies depending on the total number of rentals and features. You can test our free trial for 7 days before buying a subscription. See the additional pricing details above.
billing.faqs.question.how-is-the-booking: How is the booking fee on our Lite and Starter plans calculated?
billing.faqs.answer.how-is-the-booking-f: The booking fee is charged on all reservations, including those received through the website, as well as those from API-connected channels (Airbnb, Booking.com, Vrbo and Expedia). However, it is not charged on any iCal connections.
billing.faqs.question.what-is-included-i: What's included in the free onboarding service?
billing.faqs.answer.what-is-included-in-: Lodgify's onboarding services are here to support you so you can make the most of your subscription. An assigned specialist will walk you through the set-up of your Lodgify account, help you get connected to OTAs or channels and give you technical advice to build a bookable website. The process consists of 1-4 calls depending on the number of properties and the plan you have subscribed with.
billing.faqs.question.can-i-use-lodgify-: Can I use Lodgify if I already have a website?
billing.faqs.answer.can-i-use-lodgify-if: Yes, you can still use Lodgify as your centralized booking software. You can easily embed our booking engine on your existing website (e.g. WordPress, Squarespace, Weebly, etc) to start receiving direct bookings. Plus, you can also sync all your channels with Lodgify's channel manager and use our reservation system and/or calendar to run your short-term rental business.
billing.faqs.question.can-i-keep-the-fre: Can I keep the free domain that comes with your annual plan?
billing.faqs.answer.can-i-keep-the-free-: Yes! You can take that domain name with you and keep it indefinitely.
billing.faqs.question.can-i-try-lodgify-: Can I try Lodgify without paying?
billing.faqs.answer.can-i-try-lodgify-wi: Yes, you can fully test our software for up to 7 days prior to any payment. We don’t require a credit card number to test our software. Create your website and customize it first, before deciding on your Lodgify plan.
billing.faqs.answer.is-there-a-set-up-fe: No, there is no set-up fee when joining Lodgify. We offer a free onboarding service to guide you through the account setup.
billing.faqs.question.can-i-switch-plans: Can I switch plans at any time?
billing.faqs.answer.can-i-switch-plans-a: Yes, absolutely. You can change to a different plan at any time.
billing.faqs.question.how-do-i-pay-the-s: How do I pay the subscription plan?
billing.faqs.answer.how-do-i-pay-the-sub: We automatically charge your credit card according to your billing cycle.
billing.faqs.question.can-i-cancel-my-su: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
billing.faqs.answer.can-i-cancel-my-subs: Although we will miss you, you can cancel your subscription at any time.
billing.faqs.answer.do-you-offer-any-dis: Yes, we offer a 20% discount on our annual and a 25% discount on our two-year plan when they are paid upfront. Additionally, you will also receive a free custom domain with both of these plans.
billing.faqs.answer.are-custom-plans-ava: Yes! We provide custom plans for multi-website or multi-property users with more than 100 vacation rentals. Please contact us and we will provide you with a personalized quote.
billing.faqs.question.can-i-use-my-own-d: Can I use my own domain name (URL)?
billing.faqs.answer.can-i-use-my-own-dom: Of course! You can either use your own domain name registered with an external provider, or register a new domain name via Lodgify.
billing.faqs.question.do-i-need-a-mercha: Do I need a merchant account in order to accept credit card payments?
billing.faqs.answer.do-i-need-a-merchant: No, you don't. In order to start accepting credit card payments, all you need is a Stripe or PayPal account – you can register for free.
billing.faqs.question.are-there-any-fees: Are there any fees if I want to activate a payment gateway?
billing.faqs.answer.are-there-any-fees-i: Once you connect to one of our supported payment gateways, Lodgify collects a 1% fee on each transaction processed through the platform. Additional taxes (such as VAT) may apply depending on your country.
billing.faqs.question.do-i-need-a-web-ho: Do I need a web host or have to download anything?
billing.faqs.answer.do-i-need-a-web-host: No. Our plans include unlimited hosting for your vacation rental website. Everything is up in the cloud, so there’s no need to install anything on your computer.
billing.faqs.title: FAQ's
billing.pricing-page.taxes: Lodgify collects sales taxes where it is required by law. Stated prices do not include these taxes.

marketplace.app-page.how-it-works.title: How does {appName} work with Lodgify?
marketplace.app-page.stripe.tagline: Monthly fee instead of 1% booking fee.
marketplace.app-page.stripe.description: Stripe is a payment gateway that allows businesses to accept payments online. It offers a suite of services, including payment processing and fraud prevention, helping you manage your payments security.
marketplace.app-page.stripe.you-must-hav: You must have an active Lodgify subscription in order to activate this feature.
marketplace.app-page.stripe.enabling-thi: Enabling this feature will replace the 1% transaction fee with the monthly Stripe Premium fee.
marketplace.app-page.stripe.owner-paymen: If you are using the Owner Payments feature, this transaction fee will also be replaced with the monthly fee when owners collect reservation payments.
marketplace.app-page.stripe.note: Your card will be charged on a monthly basis.
marketplace.app-page.beyond.description: Beyond utilizes a dynamic pricing algorithm that automatically positions your properties to be booked at the best price at the right time.  While there are thousands of factors that can be used to determine demand on any given day, we’ve identified the top three that have consistently proven to correctly gauge demand: seasonality, local demand, and day of the week.
marketplace.app-page.beyond.how-it-works: Customize your rates and LoS settings in your Beyond account with expert recommendations.
Import Beyond’s dynamic and intelligent pricing to your Lodgify account.
Sync Beyond’s pricing across connected channels.
Increase your revenue by up to 40% with the dynamic pricing tool that analyzes billions of hyper-local market factors.

Track portfolio performance and understand market trends with
actionable Insights.
marketplace.app-page.beyond.steps-one: Sign in or create an account on Beyond.
marketplace.app-page.beyond.steps-two.ti: Go to Link account page in Beyond. Copy and paste your Lodgify user ID and API key and fill the form in Beyond.
After connecting your account, finalize the connection by enabling external rates in Lodgify
marketplace.app-page.beyond.steps-four.d: The connection is complete. To send your rates to Lodgify, go to Beyond and enable price posting.
marketplace.app-page.beyond.note: Once activated, your minimum stay, LoS, and rates settings must be managed from Beyond.
billing.pricing-page.price-card.features: Instant booking and request to book
marketplace.app-page.beyond.steps-one.ti: Sign in or create an account on Beyond.
website-builder.config-panel.logo.error-: Upload photos in JPG or PNG format, with a file size between 50KB and 16MB.
website-builder.config-panel.hero.error-: Upload photos in JPG or PNG format, with a file size between 50KB and 16MB.
marketplace.app-page.about-beyond: Beyond utilizes a dynamic pricing algorithm that automatically positions your properties to be booked at the best price at the right time. While there are thousands of factors that can be used to determine demand on any given day, we have identified the top three that have consistently proven to correctly gauge demand: seasonality, local demand, day of the week.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-beyond: How does Beyond work with Lodgify?
Customize your rate and LoS settings in your Beyond account with expert recommendations.
Import Beyond’s dynamic and intelligent pricing to your Lodgify account.
Sync Beyond’s pricing across connected channels.
Increase your revenue by up to 40% with the dynamic pricing tool that analyzes billions of hyper-local market factors.
Track portfolio performance and understand market trends with actionable Insights.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-beyon: Sign in or create an account on Beyond.
Go to Link account page in Beyond.
Copy and paste your Lodgify user ID.
Copy and paste your Lodgify user ID and fill out the form in Beyond
After connecting your account, finalize the connection by enabling external rates in Lodgify.
Copy and paste your Lodgify API key and fill out the form in Beyond.
The connection is complete. To send your rates to Lodgify, go to Beyond and enable price posting.
marketplace.app-page.note-beyond: Once activated, your minimum stay, LoS, and rate settings must be managed from Beyond.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-boostly: WordPress websites with Lodgify’s booking engine.
marketplace.app-page.about-boostly: Boostly is a web design and marketing agency aimed at helping drive direct reservations. The Boostly team will create, design, and optimize a WordPress website for you taking the work out of your hands.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-boostl: Outsource your website creation by working with the Boostly team to build and design your WordPress website.
Your Boostly website will pull your property, rates, availability, and reservation information straight from Lodgify, making your website bookable and accurate.
Manage your direct website from Lodgify along with other connected channels to optimize your business.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-boost: Book a consultation call with Boostly.
Copy your Lodgify API key and send it to your Boostly project manager
Your project manager will work with you to design your new website.
marketplace.app-page.note-boostly: Boostly websites are only available in English.
marketplace.app-page.additional-link-3-b: Example of a website built using the Lodgify and Boostly integration.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-checkin-sca: Guest registration and legal compliance app.
marketplace.app-page.about-checkin-scan: Check-in Scan imports your properties and reservations so you can automatically collect your guests’ traveler registration details. Collect the information quickly and easily and send the signed traveler report to the police in one click to comply with legal requirements.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-checki: Automatically import your reservation data and guest information to send registration forms to every guest before check-in.
Collect guest IDs and signatures digitally and simplify the check-in process for your guests.
Registration forms are saved in Check-in Scan and serve as a digital guestbook for your records.
Integrate your Check-in Scan account with your local police in Spain or Portugal and automatically send each form to the police to comply with country tourist regulations and avoid a fine.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-check: Sign in or create an account on Check-in Scan
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the integrations section on Check-in Scan.
Map your imported Lodgify properties to either new or existing properties on Check-in Scan.
Your assigned devices will create a unique pin entry code for every reservation.
marketplace.app-page.note-checkin-scan: Automatically sending guest registration forms to the police is only available in Spain and Portugal.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-chekin: Automate check-ins and ensure your legal compliance.
marketplace.app-page.about-chekin: A single solution to solve all of your check-in needs and comply with the legal processes required for guest registration. Chekin offers identity verification, rental agreement signatures, tourist tax calculation, keyless access through third-party integrations, as well as upsells and payment processing.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-chekin: Automatically import your property and reservations information into the Chekin platform.
Import your guest contact details to automatically send them your guest registration forms, rental agreements, and identity verification requests.
Send guest registration forms to the authorities to comply with legal tourism regulations.
Review your property information to calculate tourist rates and charge your guests these rates during the online check-in process.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-cheki: Sign in or create an account on Chekin.
Create your account on Chekin by filling out the form.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the form to connect.
If the connection is successful, you will see a banner with the integration and the status message Authorized.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-enso-connec: Leverage AI communication to save time.
marketplace.app-page.about-enso-connect: Enso Connect is a guest experience app that allows you to have better communication with your guests. Using AI technology their software provides a guest sentiment analysis so you can be sure to send the right message to the right people. Set up messaging with custom triggers and keep a record of all your guests with their CRM. Create a digital guidebook to answer all your guest's questions and let them check in smoothly and independently with the boarding pass app.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-enso-c: Import your property and reservation information.
Collect your guest contact details so you can create your CRM.
Create digital guidebooks to be sent to your guests to optimize their experience.
Build workflows and personalized messages based on guest sentiment to drive direct reservations and repeat guests.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-enso-: Sign up for Enso Connect by scheduling a demo.
Enso Connect requires a qualification call to assess your needs before you can sign up.
In your Enso Connect welcome email, click on the “Let’s get you Enso Connected” button.
Select Lodgify from the dropdown menu of PMS partners
Make sure to schedule your onboarding calls with Enso Connect so your account manager can help you set up all your workflows.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-insura-gues: Short-term rental insurance for your business.
marketplace.app-page.about-insura-guest: When damage occurs, you need to recover quickly without losing reservations. With InsuraGuest, payout amounts are provided upfront so you know the exact repair and replacement amounts you will receive for every claim, with a 72-hour payout for most claims.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-insura: Register your Lodgify rentals on InsuraGuest by adding your addresses.
Select the coverage amount you would like.
Benefit from instant coverage for your registered rentals.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-insur: Sign in or create an account on InsureGuest and select Lodgify as a PMS/Channel manager when registering.
Add your address for all properties you would like to cover.
Choose your subscription plan and complete the checkout page for instant coverage.
marketplace.app-page.note-insura-guest: Properties must be located in the USA (rental owner/property manager can reside anywhere).
marketplace.app-page.tagline-jervis: Automate your rental access with keyless solutions.
marketplace.app-page.about-jervis: Jervis Systems is an access management platform that allows you to automate vacation rental access, through a single app. Jervis Systems automatically creates PIN codes for contactless check-in and property access and offers multiple property entry options including SET Pin Code, text, call, and voice command.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-jervis: Import your properties and map them to smart lock device.
Import your reservation information and guest details.
Automatically send guests a unique PIN code to access your property before their check-in.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-jervi: Sign in or create an account on Jervis Systems and select Lodgify as the PMS when registering.
Copy your Lodgify API Key and paste it into the Lodgify form in the Jervis Systems marketplace.
Import your lock devices in the Jervis platform and assign them to a Lodgify rental.
Your assigned devices will create a unique pin entry code for every reservation.
marketplace.app-page.note-jervis: You must have a supported smart lock device to use this app.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-price-labs: Revenue management and dynamic pricing tool.
marketplace.app-page.about-price-labs: PriceLabs is a powerful revenue management and dynamic pricing software for vacation and short-term rentals. Automatically update your rates based on historical trends and market data.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-price-: Customize your rates and LoS settings in PriceLabs and receive their rate recommendations based on market insights.
Push your PriceLabs rates to Lodgify and your other connected channels to increase revenue and occupancy.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-price: Sign in or create an account on PriceLabs and select "Connect to your Airbnb / PMS account". Then choose Lodgify as your PMS.
Copy and paste your Lodgify user ID and fill out the form in PriceLabs.
Copy and paste your Lodgify API key and fill out the form in PriceLabs.
To export your rates to Lodgify, go to PriceLabs and click Sync all.
marketplace.app-page.note-price-labs: Once activated, your minimum stay settings must be managed from PriceLabs.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-revyoos: Review aggregator widget to take control over your reviews.
marketplace.app-page.about-revyoos: Revyoos is a customer review platform that allows you to collect and showcase your customer feedback seamlessly. The platform provides a widget that you can embed into your website that will allow you to showcase all your reviews aggregated from your listings and connected channels. With Revyoos, you can improve your online reputation and increase guest trust and loyalty while driving more sales and enhancing your guest experience.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-revyoo: Download the reviews you have collected in Lodgify and other platforms and upload them to your Revyoos account.
Your Revyoos widget will then aggregate all your reviews in one place.
Embed the Revyoos widget to your Lodgify website or other websites to display all your reviews.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-revyo: Sign in or create an account on Revyoos.
Set up your properties one by one or bulk-upload via CSV or Excel file.
Create your Revyoos widget and insert it into your Lodgify website.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-safely: Short term rental insurance and guest screening.
marketplace.app-page.about-safely: Safely is the premier provider of short-term rental protection, offering rigorous guest screening and comprehensive insurance coverage. The integration with Safely will help bring you confidence and peace of mind as you grow revenue, reduce risk, and provide a better guest experience.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-safely: Import your properties and reservation information into Safely to insure your Lodgify's and other connected channel reservations.
Share the cost of insurance with your guests by adding a small mandatory fee to all your reservations.
Have peace of mind that your guests and rentals are safe with Safely’s customizable plans and dedicated support team.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-safel: Sign in or create an account on Safely and fill out the Safely sign up form for Lodgify users.
Copy your Lodgify user ID and API key and paste them into the Safely form.
A Safely representative will connect with you to customize your insurance plan and import your properties from Lodgify.
Once the connection is set up with Safely you can add the insurance cost as a mandatory fee.
marketplace.app-page.note-safely:
Rentals must be located in the USA to be insured. 
Insurance services are provided through Lodgify Insurance Services Inc. (CA License #6014335) (“LIS”) an insurance agency affiliate of Codebay Solutions Ltd. with its principal place of business in 1700 W Irving Park Road Suite 209A, Chicago, IL 60613. LIS acts in partnership with On Demand Insurance Agency, LLC (dba Safely), an unaffiliated insurance agency which offers insurance business on behalf Obsidian Specialty Insurance Company (NAIC# 16871). LIS is licensed as a property casualty insurance agency in all jurisdictions in which it offers insurance products (see further license information here https://www.lodgify.com/insurance-licenses). Not all insurance coverages or products are available in all jurisdictions. All insurance products are governed by the terms, conditions, limitations, and exclusions in the applicable insurance policy. Coverage is subject to actual policy language. LIS may be paid a commission, fee or other compensation for its services.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-stasher: Hassle-free luggage storage solution for your properties.
marketplace.app-page.about-stasher: Stasher is a luggage storage app with a marketplace of luggage storage locations around the world where guests can leave their luggage after checking out for a fee per bag. Sign up for free and earn a 10% commission on every storage booking purchased by your guests.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-stashe: Sign up and be approved by Stasher to be an affiliate.
Receive a luggage booking link that you paste into your guest communications.
Earn a 10% commission for every luggage booking made by your guests.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-stash: Sign up with Stasher via the form and select Lodgify as the PMS when registering.
Set your currency preferences and copy your Stasher luggage booking link.
Paste your link into the communications with your guests.
Send to all your guests to get a 10% commission on any of their luggage bookings.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-superhog: Intelligent guest screening and damage protection.
marketplace.app-page.about-superhog: Truvi is the leading global digital trust platform for the vacation rental industry. Truvi enables a growing ecosystem of hosts, operators, and guests to make their online activity safer, providing a tech-based, AI-supported toolkit including biometric recognition, ID verification, and screening technology.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-superh: Import your property and reservation information, as well as your guest details.
Automatically send verification communications to your guests before check-in.
Collect guest identity information and run comprehensive background checks so you are sure you know your guests.
Provide additional protection if anything goes wrong during your guests' stay in your rental.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-super: Sign in or create an account on Truvi.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the Truvi integration page.
Select the properties you would like to add to Truvi.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-tidy: Cleaning and maintenance of properties made easy.
marketplace.app-page.about-tidy: TIDY is a cleaning and property maintenance automation app allowing property managers to easily take care of turnovers between guests. Jobs can be set up and scheduled automatically between reservations. TIDY has a network of professionals that can be assigned to jobs or you can add your already known and trusted professionals to assign jobs to. TIDY also allows for the automatic payment of professionals so everything is automated.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-tidy.i: Import your property details and reservation information.
Set up your scheduling preferences for every reservation to ensure that your rental is clean and restocked before your next guests arrival.
Set up reoccurring maintenance jobs to keep everything in tip-top shape.
Use the marketplace of professionals to help you find staff to complete jobs when you need them and send payments.
Sign in or create an account on TIDY.
Click Import properties and select Lodgify from the dropdown list.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into TIDY to link your properties and import your reservations.
Select your scheduling preferences on TIDY and automate your turnovers.
marketplace.app-page.note-tidy: Properties must be located in a country with a zip code to use the software.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-turnoverbnb: Find, schedule, and pay cleaners with ease.
marketplace.app-page.about-turnoverbnb: Turno provides you with a single app to schedule cleanings with automatic assignments, delegation, and acceptance. Invite your cleaners or create projects to be bid on by Turno’s marketplace of vetted and certified cleaners. This integration allows you to import your properties and reservations instantly so your cleaning projects will be scheduled automatically.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-turnov: Import your property information to automatically create it in Turno.
Import your reservation information so all your reservations are in your Turno calendar.
Set your recurring cleaning and scheduling preferences so that your rental is always ready for your next guest.
Can’t find a cleaner? No problem, visit the marketplace of cleaners and send payments automatically on the platform.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-turno: Sign in or create an account on Turno.
Select Lodgify as a PMS/Channel manager when registering.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into Turno to link your properties and import your reservations.
Select your cleaning project preferences in Turno and start scheduling cleanings.
marketplace.app-page.about-zapier: The Zapier app enables you to connect your Lodgify account to your Zapier account. Zapier allows you to connect your Lodgify account to more than 5000 external apps.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-zapier: Zapier serves as a middleman to allow you to connect Lodgify to hundreds of external apps.
Set up Zaps in Zapier to automate workflows that are tailored to your business needs.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-zapie: Sign into or create an account in Zapier.
Go to the My Apps section and click on Add Connection and search for Lodgify.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into Zapier along with your email.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-minut: Monitor noise and occupancy, and secure your rental property.
marketplace.app-page.about-minut: Minut is the co-host that cares for your home, guests, and community. The Minut sensor monitors noise, occupancy, motion, and temperature in rental properties, helping hosts prevent parties, enhance guest experience and protect their homes while respecting guest privacy. With powerful automation and integrations, Minut empowers property managers to grow their businesses while keeping operations lean.
Save time and automatically fetch reservation data for your rentals.
Send messages to guests if loud noise is detected and remind them about house rules.
Enhance guest experience with welcome messages to guests.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-minut: Sign in or create an account on Minut
Select Lodgify as your PMS in the integrations section in your Minut dashboard.
Click Connect and paste your Lodgify API key.
Map your Lodgify properties to your Minut properties.
Once your properties are mapped your reservation information will import automatically.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-touch-stay: Customized guidebooks to share with your guests.
marketplace.app-page.about-touch-stay: Love updating paper docs or answering the same old guest questions? Us neither! Touch Stay digital guest welcome books replace printed guest information manuals with an easy-to-access anywhere and eco-friendly guidebook loved by operators and guests. More than just a guidebook though, collect guest data, capture first impressions, and inspire them to plan their best trip with timely scheduled messages - all included in the subscription.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-touch-: Import your property and reservation information.
Automatically create guidebooks for your imported properties including your rental name, address, and cover image.
Automatically sends your guidebook to your guests for every reservation.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-touch: Sign in or create an account on Touch Stay.
Navigate to the integration tab and click Connect under Lodgify.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the Touch Stay integrations page.
You can now create guidebooks by importing property information from Lodgify.
marketplace.app-page.note-touch-stay: Make sure your address is not hidden from your website in Lodgify so that it gets exported to your guidebook.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-ga: Track and measure your websites' performance.
marketplace.app-page.about-ga: The Google Analytics app allows you to track your Lodgify website statistics.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-ga.ite: Monitor your marketing activities and get insights about your users.
Track who is visiting your website and how travelers find you.
Make data-driven decisions on what actions to take and when to create new content for your website.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-ga.st: Sign up for a free Google Analytics account or log in.
Go to Admin and select your property.
In the Property column, access Data streams and then click the data stream.
Click Configure tag settings, and copy the ID that starts with "G-" or "AW-".
Indicate the website you would like to track from the list below and then paste the ID you copied in the previous step.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-mailchimp: Grow your business with the all-in-one marketing solution.
marketplace.app-page.about-mailchimp: Mailchimp is an all-in-one marketing platform that helps businesses manage their email marketing, automation, and advertising campaigns. With Mailchimp, you can create and send targeted, personalized email campaigns to your subscribers. The platform is easy to use and offers a variety of templates and design tools to help you build your brand.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-mailch: Activating Mailchimp will automatically show a newsletter subscription form on your website.
Visitors can sign up for your newsletter to receive important information and drive repeat customers.
Create a list of guest emails to grow your Mailchimp audience.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-mailc: Sign up or create an account on Mailchimp.
Where to find your API Key
Where to find your Audience/List ID
Copy your Mailchimp API key and Audience/List ID.
Navigate back to the Lodgify marketplace and enable the toggle for your website.
Paste your Mailchimp API key and Audience/List ID.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-recaptcha: Prevent abusive activities on your website.
marketplace.app-page.about-recaptcha: reCAPTCHA is a free service from Google that helps protect websites from spam and abuse. It uses advanced risk analysis techniques to determine whether a user is a human or a bot.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-recapt: reCAPTCHA requires guests to prove they are human on the check-out page of your Lodgify website and booking engine before they can submit the request.
reCAPTCHA will only be shown if you do not accept credit card payments.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-recap: Enable the toggle for your website.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-segment: Collect, clean, and activate your customer data.
marketplace.app-page.about-segment: Segment is a customer data platform that helps businesses centralize customer data from various sources and use it to create personalized experiences. It provides a unified API to collect, store, and manage customer data, and offers integrations with various marketing, analytics, and business tools to enable data analysis and activation. Segment aims to help organizations create better customer experiences by providing a single source of truth for customer data and enabling data-driven decision-making.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-segmen: Connect your Lodgify and Segment accounts so that you can track your website’s performance with over 300 different analytics tools.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-segme: Sign in or create an account on Segment.
Add your Lodgify website URL as the “source” in Segment.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the Setting section in Segment.

And we're not done yet - check out the upcoming improvements:
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-beyon: After connecting your account, finalize the connection by enabling external rates in Lodgify.
The connection is complete. To send your rates to Lodgify, go to Beyond and enable price posting.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-enso-: Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the box.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-price: After connecting your account, enable external rates in Lodgify to finalize the setup.
To export your rates to Lodgify, go to PriceLabs and click "Sync all".
marketplace.app-page.tagline-folio: Guidebooks to improve guest experience and operations.
marketplace.app-page.about-folio: Folio lets you create stylish, digital guidebooks that your guests will actually use, saving you time and money. Use their guidebooks to share property information (including photos and videos), recommend local activities, and promote your brand to drive repeat reservations. This integration allows you to import your property information to set up your guidebooks even faster.
Import your property information to automatically create guidebooks.
Import your rental name, cover image, and address to populate your guidebooks.
Create a guidebook link you can include in your guest communications to improve their experience and help save you time.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-folio: Sign in or create an account on Folio.
Select Lodgify as PMS when registering.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the Folio integrations page.
You can now create guidebooks by importing property information from Lodgify.
marketplace.app-page.note-folio: Make sure your address is not hidden from your website in Lodgify so that it gets exported to your guidebook.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-do-inn: Housekeeping ops center with access to cleaners at a click.
marketplace.app-page.about-do-inn: Doinn is a housekeeping operations platform that enables hospitality operators to quickly transition from facing labor shortages to having access to a professional and certified workforce. In addition, the SaaS platform allows you to digitize all of your operations, saving you time and money.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-do-inn: Import property details required when requesting a cleaning service such as the address, number of bedrooms, bathrooms, and size of the property.
Import your reservations so you can schedule cleanings between guest stays or offer your guests a mid-stay cleaning.
Automatically schedule recurrent services, so you can focus your time on other tasks.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-do-in: Sign in or create an account on Doinn.
Navigate to the integration tab and click Activate under Lodgify.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the Doinn integrations page.
Select the properties you would like to add to Doinn to import their information.
You can now schedule services for your connected properties.
analytics.chart.tooltip.revenue: Total revenue from reservations in the period and rentals selected. Canceled reservations are excluded.
analytics.chart.tooltip.guests-hosted: Total number of guests hosted according to the reservations in the period and rentals selected.
analytics.chart.tooltip.nights-filled: Total number of nights sold according to the reservations in the period and rentals selected. Reservations' check-in and checkout dates are considered.

marketplace.app-page.about-stripe: Are you using Stripe as your main payment gateway and are paying a 1% + VAT transaction fee for each payment received? Stripe Premium can help you get rid of the transaction fee and just pay a flat amount per month. In case you are using Lodgify’s Owner payments feature, and your Owners are using Stripe to collect reservation payments, the transaction fee will be waived for all your Owners as well.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-stripe: You must have an active Lodgify subscription to activate this app
You must have Stripe activated as the main payment gateway in Lodgify.
Enabling this app will replace the 1% transaction fee with the monthly Stripe Premium fee.
If you are using Lodgify’s Owner payments feature, this transaction fee will also be replaced with the monthly fee when owners collect reservation payments.
marketplace.app-page.about-bookable-unit: If you have several rooms or apartments that have identical locations, amenities, photos, and rates, you can create multiple units inside a single rental subscription. Instead of having to create separate rentals for each of your identical units, activating this app will allow you to choose how many units you have within this rental type.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-bookab: You first need an active Lodgify subscription to activate this app.
Activating the app will allow you to have multiple units of a given rental.
Rental location, along with amenities, photos, and rates must be identical, you will not be able to edit features of individual units.
Guests will have the ability to make a separate reservation for each unit.

Units are not uniquely identified on the calendar or in reservations, they will appear as reservations under the rental. You will continue to have open availability for that rental until all the units are booked.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-dack: Provide your guests with a digital stay from reservation to checkout.
marketplace.app-page.about-dack: DACK is an all-in-one, mobile-first guest experience platform. DACK enables operators to provide their guests with digital access, contactless check-in and checkout, in-stay surveys, intuitive property guidebooks, one-touch WiFi, local recommendations, and dynamic upsells via a powerful and intuitive mobile application. DACK is available in iOS, Android, and web versions.

Import your reservations and guest details.
Automatically send every guest your DACK app so they can optimize their stay.

flow.rental-sync.configurations.listing-: Must climb stairs
Guests can expect to walk up and down stairs during their stay.
Potential for noise
Guests can expect to hear some noise during their stay. Ex: traffic, construction, nearby businesses.
Pet(s) live on property
Guests may encounter pets in the property.
No parking on property
This property does not have dedicated parking for guests.
Some spaces are shared
Guests can expect to share spaces with other people during their stay. Ex: kitchen, bathroom, patio, etc.
Amenity limitations
Guests should not expect some essentials they are used to when traveling. Ex: Wi-Fi, running water, indoor shower, etc.
Weapons on property
Guests should be aware that there is at least one weapon stored on this property. Airbnb requires all weapons to be properly stored and secured. Learn more.
Security cameras/audio recording devices

The property has a security camera or recording device capable of recording or sending video, audio, or still images. Airbnb requires hosts to inform guests of any such camera or device located in a common area – even if it will be turned off during a guest’s stay. Airbnb prohibits security cameras or recording devices in private spaces like bedrooms, bathrooms, or sleeping areas.
Potentially dangerous animal
Guests (and their pets) will be around or near wild or domesticated animals that could cause harm because of their behavior or size. E.g. horse, or dog that growls or bites, etc.
Pool/hot tub without a gate or lock
Guests will have direct access to an ungated/unlocked in-ground or above-ground swimming pool or hot tub.
Nearby lake, river, other body of water
Guests will have direct, unrestricted access to any permanent natural or artificial body of water located directly on or next to the property. E.g. sea/beach, pond, stream, wetlands.
Climbing or play structure
Guests (including children) will have access to structures or items intended for climbing or playing on. E.g., swing, slide, playset, climbing ropes.
Heights without rails or protection
Guests will have access to an area or structure that reaches a height of more than 1.4 meters (4.6 feet) and does not have a rail or other protection. E.g. balcony, roof, terrace, etc.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-vikey: A solution for home automation, keyless access, and online check-in.
marketplace.app-page.about-vikey: Vikey is a software and hardware provider for keyless access and other check-in needs. With Vikey, you can remotely manage access to your street and interior doors using Vikey locks and an app. Guests will be able to autonomously unlock the doors using their smartphones, eliminating the hassle of picking up keys and ensuring a seamless guest experience. Additionally, you can send your guests a registration form prior to check-in and have the information sent directly to the authorities to comply with EU hosting regulations. Vikey also offers hardware solutions for monitoring your energy consumption and reducing costs.
Import your rentals and reservation details.
Enable the self-check-in feature for your guests.
Transmit guest information to the police for legal compliance.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-dinb: Make and optimize blog posts with this blog & SEO tool.
marketplace.app-page.about-dinb: DropInBlog allows you to add a full-featured, and SEO-friendly, blog to your Lodgify website. With multiple layout options to choose from and control of what elements show on your blog, DropInBlog helps you to create beautiful-looking posts while remaining simple to use. To assist you in growing your website traffic, DropInBlog has a built-in SEO Analyzer. It scores your posts as you type and offers customized suggestions on how you can tweak specific elements to gain the best on-page SEO optimization.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-dinb.i: Integrate DropInBlog into a page on your website by simply pasting a few lines of code.
Your website colors and font styles will automatically be applied to your blog to create a seamless aesthetic.
Create better content and help boost your search engine rankings using DropInBlog’s built-in SEO analyzer.
Sign in or create an account on DropInBlog
Copy the Step 1 and Step 2 code shown on the Code & Layout page of your DropInBlog account.
Navigate to the Lodgify Website builder section to edit your pages.
Paste the Step 1 and Step 2 code of DropInBlog into the Raw HTML widget on a new or existing page of your website.

Property managers use Clearing to collect and track their cash flow from multiple sources, manage their expenses, generate owner statements, and pay homeowners and vendors.

Generate owner statements, and commission calculations, and make payments.

website-builder.settings.domain.security: Complete the required actions below to update your DNS manager records and keep your third-party domain secure.
The domain is accurately directed to 162.159.129.68 and responding to our requests.

1. Copy the names and values of the TXT and CNAME records below.
2. Navigate to your domain provider and locate your TXT and CNAME records sections.
3. Add the names and values of each record by pasting them. Afterwards, remove the old CNAME record values.
4. Click 'Done' and wait for validation before proceeding to the next step. This process may take up to 30 minutes.

1. Copy the host name and IP address value below.
2. Navigate to your domain provider and locate your A records section.
3. Add the values for each record by pasting them.
4. Click 'Done' and wait for validation before proceeding to the next step. This process may take up to 10 minutes.

1. Navigate to your domain provider and locate your A and AAAA records section.
2. Find and remove the Host and IP address values below.
3. Hit ‘Done’ below to validate this step. Validation may take up to 10 minutes.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-glamping-hu: Top platform to book unique glamping accommodations in nature.
marketplace.app-page.about-glamping-hub: Glamping Hub is the leading booking platform for unique accommodations in nature, listing a variety of cabins, domes, tiny houses, tree houses, safari tents, and more. Glamping Hub was the original glamping marketplace when it was founded in 2013. We have booked thousands of guests looking to reconnect with nature. We offer close to 20k listings across 110 countries. When you list with Glamping Hub, you have access to all the benefits of our partnerships— your property will also be visible on Kayak and Google Travel for even more exposure.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-glampi: Listing content: photos, description, amenities, and location
Rates: default and seasonal rates, reservation settings, taxes, and fees.
Live quoting: your Glamping Hub listing will pull a live quote from your Lodgify website pricing and booking settings.
Reservation details: guest name, email address, phone number, and number of guests.
Automatic responses: guests will receive your set automatic responses under the “Manual & website” setting.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-glamp: Complete the signup form for Glamping Hub
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the Glamping Hub form.
You will receive an email from Glamping Hub with your account login details and further steps to complete your listing.
Done 🎉 Glamping Hub will send you a link to your new listing!
marketplace.app-page.note-glamping-hub: To be listed, the rental must be in a Glamping Hub-supported currency (USD, CAD, AUD, NZD, EUR, GBP), and it must meet Glamping Hub’s specified requirements, detailed in the form linked in Step 1.

smart-pricing.smart-pricing-page.how-it-: Dynamic Pricing’s algorithm calculates the best nightly rate considering market trends and specific rental attributes like size, type, and amenities.
Activate Dynamic Pricing for selected rentals to receive custom rate recommendations. Note that a small 0.8% fee per reservation will apply when active.
Click 'Define' under Min-Max to establish minimum and maximum limits. This ensures the recommended rates align with your pricing preferences.

Click 'View prices' to access your calendar. Review and adjust minimum stays and restrictions, and override nightly prices for specific dates. Note: Overridden rates hide price suggestions. Remove overrides to see suggestions.
If you ever want to reset your original settings, simply deactivate Dynamic Pricing.

smart-locks.settings.pre-signin-pro.head: Automate the creation and submission of entry codes for your smart locks with Lodgify’s integration
smart-locks.settings.pre-signin-pro.desc: Smart locks replace traditional keys with one-use entry codes to enhance your rental security. Integrate smart locks from various brands into Lodgify to manage them centrally. Automatically generate entry codes for each reservation and share them with guests via automated messages.
availability.advance-notice.card.title: Advance notice
availability.advance-notice.card.subtitl: Specify the latest time to make a reservation.
availability.advance-notice.slider.title: Advance notice
availability.advance-notice.slider.subti: Set the latest booking time in the rental’s time zone. This setting applies to all channels.
availability.advance-notice.slider.remov: It will be deleted from any channels where this was set up.
Smart locks replace traditional keys with entry codes for your rental door. They allow you to designate codes to be entered on a keypad or through an app for secure and keyless access, and monitor their status.
We recommend that you check the list of supported brands in the search bar on the right before syncing an already-owned smart lock or purchasing a new one.
If you have already purchased and installed a device of a supported brand, click on “Sync devices” and follow the instructions to integrate them with Lodgify.
Once you have synchronized your devices, assign devices to your rentals in Lodgify so that entry codes are automatically generated for each of your reservations in those rentals.
About Smart Locks activation and pricing terms

You can activate this feature by syncing your devices. There is no charge for syncing. However, please note that each device assigned to a rental will result in an additional $6 charge to your monthly fee.
