smart-locks.settings.disclaimer.descript: Smart Locks Service is offered to you by Lodgify through Seam Labs, Inc. ('Seam'). You shall first sync/connect your Device on Seam, or otherwise authorize Seam to control your Device, in order to access to our Smart Locks Service. You may choose to authorize Seam though a third-party mechanism or by sharing your Device credentials to Seam. Such activities are outside of our control and are subject to Seam Platform Terms of Service, Seam Acceptable Use Policy and applicable law.

Lodgify will not be responsible for direct damages nor any lost of profits, or any indirect, punitive, incidental, special, consequential, or exemplary damages arising out of, or in connection with, Customer's Device connection and/or configuration on Seam Platform.

When you sync/connect a device, we may collect information such as your login email or telephone number for the device provider, status and usage of your device and log/event information. Your personal data will be processed by Seam on our behalf to provide the Service. Please, read the following information carefully to understand our views and practices regarding personal data as well as your rights regarding this data. Make sure you have thoroughly understood this information before syncing/connecting your smart lock device
smart-locks.settings.privacy-policies.mo: Smart Locks Privacy Notice

In Lodgify we are committed with protecting Customers’ privacy. Therefore, we apply the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) (EU) 2016/679 and other applicable legislation to our services to ensure personal data safety.
When you sync/connect a smart lock device to your Lodgify user account, we may collect information related to your login email or telephone number for lock provider, status and usage of your device and log/event information.
Please, read the following information carefully to understand our views and practices regarding personal data as well as your rights regarding this data.
Make sure you have thoroughly understood this information before syncing/connecting your smart lock device
Basic information
Basic information
CODEBAY SOLUTIONS S.L.U.
Purposes of processing
To provide the connection service for the smart lock
Legitimation
The performance of a contract
Data Subject Rights
Access, rectify, oppose, delete data, as well as other rights, as explained in the supplemental information.
Additional information
Please consult the supplemental information below.
Supplemental information

In relation to this processing of personal data, the data controller is CODEBAY SOLUTIONS S.L.U., with registered office at Avenida Josep Tarradellas, 20 - 30 P. 5, 08029, Barcelona (hereinafter, also referred as 'LODGIFY'), email address: privacy@lodgify.com.

Your personal data will be processed to provide you the requested connection service for Smart Locks.

The legal basis for the processing of your personal data is the performance of a contract between you and LODGIFY.

LODGIFY shall not use your personal data for profiling purposes and shall not take any automated decision based on it.

We will retain the logs related to your activity over two weeks. We will not store a copy of such logs. We will retain the rest of information you provided as long as you decide to use the Smart Locks service or before, if you request us to delete such information. We will encrypt the email and phone number provided to us for authentication at rest.

We will keep your data blocked and prevented from being processed, except for the provision of the data to the judges and courts, the Public Prosecutor's Office or the competent Public Administrations, in particular the data protection authorities, for the enforcement of possible liabilities arising from the processing and during the time required. LODGIFY may share your personal data with Seam Labs, Inc. and other third-party service providers when such data are necessary for them to provide a service to LODGIFY. Please note that Lodgify has signed has a contract in place requiring them to keep your information confidential and not to use it other than in accordance with LODGIFY specific instructions.
As data subject, you have the following rights regarding the processing of your personal data:
Right to obtain confirmation as to whether or not your personal data are being processed, and, where that is the case, access to the personal data that Lodgify hold about you.
Right to withdraw consent to processing.
Right to have your personal data rectified when it is inaccurate or no longer valid or to have it completed when it is incomplete.

Right to obtain the erasure of your personal data without undue delay where: your personal data are no longer necessary in relation to the purposes for which they were collected or otherwise processed; you withdraw consent on which the processing is based; your personal data have been unlawfully processed; personal data have to be erased for compliance with a legal obligation.

Right to restrict the processing of your personal data where you believe it is not accurate or it is unlawful for us to do so, or you have objected to its use and our investigation is pending or you require us to keep it in connection with legal proceedings.
Right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format and right to transmit those data to another controller without hindrance.
If you wish to exercise any of the aforementioned rights, you can at any time directly contact LODGIFY by sending the appropriate request at the following addresses:
CODEBAY SOLUTIONS S.L.U., Avenida de Josep Tarradellas, 20-30, P.5., Barcelona, Spain
privacy@lodgify.com
Finally, if you are concerned about the way LODGIFY has processed your personal data, you may complain to the supervisory authority (Agencia Española de Protección de Datos www.aepd.es).

marketplace.app-page.about-rentamira: Rentamira is an AI-driven marketing platform designed specifically for short-term rentals. It provides in-depth competitor analysis, uncovers valuable insights about your target audience, and highlights your unique selling features. With Rentamira, you gain access to a suite of effective marketing tools that streamline your promotional efforts. These include social media automation, Airbnb listing optimization, Website SEO audit reports and tailored blog content.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-rentam: Automatically export guest data and reservations from Lodgify to Rentamira.
Rentamira analyzes past and future Lodgify reservations to profile guests, reviews, and trends. It then creates social media captions, hashtags, blogs, and email copy tailored to your exact audience.
Rentamira optimizes listing descriptions with seasonal keywords for better visibility.
It provides comprehensive website SEO reports to monitor your search engine progress.

Our platform provides a best-in-class user experience catering to a wide selection of properties in the U.S., Canada, Mexico, and the Caribbean.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-dynamic-pri: Optimize your prices and increase revenue with Dynamic Pricing.
marketplace.app-page.about-dynamic-prici: Dynamic Pricing is an in-house tool designed specifically with Lodgify users in mind. The tool takes into account market insights specific to your rental, to instantly provide you with 18 months of data-backed pricing recommendations that are published on your Lodgify website and connected channels. Take the guesswork out of pricing your rental and maximize your revenue.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-dynami: Activate Dynamic Pricing for each rental.
The tool looks at the location and attributes of your vacation rental, and history of reservations.
Get 18 months of data-backed pricing recommendations in seconds.
Customize your prices using the min. and max. price settings.
Adjust your prices with nightly overrides.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-dynam: Go to the Dynamic Pricing page.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-duve: Personalized end-to-end guest experience management platform
marketplace.app-page.about-duve: Duve revolutionizes guest experience with a personalized suite, helping hoteliers create tailored digital journeys for each guest. Features include online check-in flows, a web-based guest app with content in the guests' native language, and personalized upsells to increase revenue and satisfaction. Duve transforms guest experience at thousands of hotels and vacation rentals worldwide.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-duve.i: Duve seamlessly integrates with Lodgify for enhanced guest management.
Automated check-in/out processes streamline hotel operations.
2-way integration keeps calendars and reservations synchronized.
Real-time updates provide timely, accurate information to guests.
Unified inbox consolidates all guest communications.
Personalized interactions enhance the overall guest experience.
Sign in or create an account on Duve.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into the connections section on Duve.
Done 🎉 Your rentals and reservations will now appear in Duve.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-wordpress: Plugin for Search Box External Widget
marketplace.app-page.about-wordpress: To start driving direct bookings for your business, simply paste the embeddable code Lodgify generates for your vacation rental’s website. You also have the option to customize the direct booking widget so that it fits seamlessly with your website’s layout via your Lodgify account. Users can start making direct bookings through your website as soon as you install the plugin. When users click on the booking widget, they will be directed to the All Properties page, the specific property page, and finally the Checkout page, in that order. Additional details can be found here.

After you have changed your DNS settings, go to Google Public DNS to clear the cache and make sure updates work right. Enter your domain without www (e.g., yourdomain.com) and click "Flush cache." Then do the same for the www version (e.g., www.yourdomain.com).

website-builder.settings.domain.security: Validate CAA and DNSSEC settings in your DNS manager

1. Log in to your DNS manager and access your domain settings.
2. Make sure there are no CAA records present.
3. Locate the DNSSEC settings. If DNSSEC is enabled, disable it.
4. Click 'Done' and wait for validation before proceeding to the next step. This process may take up to 48 hours.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-homeit: Keyless access and smart locks for seamless property management
marketplace.app-page.about-homeit: Homeit offers a fast, reliable solution for managing keyless property access in real-time from anywhere. With a multi-sided platform, it enables instant, secure entry for guests and service providers without the need for physical keys. Tailored for all property types, including those with communal doors, Homeit simplifies property management for short-term rentals, enhancing convenience, user experience, and quality of life for both hosts and guests.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-homeit: Automatically send digital key invitation links to guests upon receiving a Lodgify reservation.
Keyless access details are shared instantly with guests, allowing for seamless check-ins at any time.
Digital keys are tied to the reservation, automatically expiring once the reservation ends.
Reservation cancellations trigger automatic key deactivation, ensuring property security.
Integration reduces manual tasks, simplifying guest access management for property managers.
Enhance guest experience and streamline operations with real-time, automated access control.

smart-locks.splash-screen.main-descripti: Save time and offer your guests a seamless check-in experience by managing all your smart locks from Lodgify. Connect your smart lock devices from various brands to control everything in one centralized platform. Your codes will be automatically generated and sent to your guests for every reservation, replacing the need for traditional keys and enhancing your efficiency and rental security.

smart-locks.splash-screen.disclaimer:
Smart Locks service is offered to you by Lodgify through Seam Labs, Inc. ('Seam'). You shall first connect your Device on Seam, or otherwise authorize Seam to control your Device, in order to access to our Smart Locks service. You may choose to authorize Seam though a third-party mechanism or by sharing your Device credentials to Seam. Such activities are outside of our control and are subject to Seam Platform Terms of Service, Seam Acceptable Use Policy and applicable law.

Lodgify will not be responsible for direct damages nor any lost of profits, or any indirect, punitive, incidental, special, consequential, or exemplary damages arising out of, or in connection with, Customer's Device connection and/or configuration on Seam Platform.

When you connect a device, we may collect information such as your login email or telephone number for lock provider, status and usage of your device and log/event information. Please carefully read our Smart Locks Privacy Notice before connecting a device. Your personal data will be processed by Seam on our behalf to provide the Service.

smart-pricing.splash-screen.main-title: Optimize your rental rates with Lodgify Dynamic Pricing
smart-pricing.splash-screen.main-descrip: Experience the power of data-driven pricing with nightly rates tailored for your rental using our all-in-one dynamic pricing solution. Keep your listing prices competitive and maximize revenue all year round.
smart-pricing.splash-screen.benefits-lis: Skip the constant monitoring and manual adjustments. Your rates are automatically adjusted to be as competitive as possible.
Refine your pricing strategy at any point. You can easily adjust nightly overrides and set minimum and maximum thresholds.
Maximize your rental revenue with dynamic rates that strategically adapt to market demand and trends.
smart-pricing.splash-screen.how-to-use.t: How to use Lodgify Dynamic Pricing
smart-pricing.splash-screen.how-to-use.d: Lodgify Dynamic Pricing uses an advanced algorithm to calculate the optimal nightly rate for your rental. The algorithm factors in hundreds of data points, including market trends, seasonality, and demand as well as specific key rental attributes such as size, type, and amenities.
smart-pricing.splash-screen.how-to-use.a: Enable Lodgify Dynamic Pricing to start receiving nightly rate suggestions for your rentals.
smart-pricing.splash-screen.how-to-use.r: Check your optimized nightly rates on the calendar to revise your pricing strategy.
smart-pricing.splash-screen.how-to-use.a: Fine-tune the recommended prices as needed to fit your preferences and seasonal strategy.
smart-pricing.splash-screen.algorithm.de: We offer a powerful pricing algorithm backed by vast market insights through our partnership with a leading industry data provider. The algorithm analyzes millions of pricing and booking data points across major third-party booking platforms (Airbnb, Booking, Vrbo, etc.)  and other sources. Using advanced machine learning, it processes 40+ property attributes, local trends, and market conditions to deliver dynamic, data-driven pricing recommendations that maximize your rental’s performance.

payments.overview.faq.question-1: What do I need to set up Lodgify Payments?
payments.overview.faq.answer-1: To set up Lodgify Payments, you must provide your email address, legal first and last name, date of birth, address, routing number, account number, company name, and business owner information. For the full list of requirements, refer to the articles in the knowledge base.
payments.overview.faq.question-2: How long does it take to set up Lodgify Payments?
payments.overview.faq.answer-2: Setting up Lodgify Payments is quick and typically takes just one to two minutes if you have all the required information and documents ready. For details on required documents, refer to this article.
payments.overview.faq.question-3: How long does the approval process take?
payments.overview.faq.answer-3: The approval process may be instant. If additional information is needed, we will notify you by email, and a notification banner will appear in your Lodgify account.
payments.overview.features.feature-1.des: Keep your payments safe with built-in security features.
payments.overview.features.feature-2.des: Receive payouts automatically, simplifying your cash flow.
payments.overview.features.feature-3.des: Manage all your payment activities from one place.
payments.overview.features.feature-4.des: Offer your guests various ways to pay for convenience.
payments.overview.features.feature-5.des: Get quick assistance from our dedicated payment team.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-botel-ai: Maximize revenue and simplify operations with Botel AI
marketplace.app-page.about-botel-ai: Botel Agentic AI is a next-generation property management software designed to streamline communication channels and automate guest interactions for property managers. It integrates various platforms such as email, SMS, WhatsApp, and Airbnb into a single intelligent system. The platform's core feature is its Agentic AI, which continuously learns from past and future conversations to deliver accurate, automated answers to guests' queries and proactively handle their requests.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-vrplatform: The ultimate accounting solution for short-term rentals
marketplace.app-page.about-vrplatform: VRPlatform is the future in Accounting solutions for the short-term rental industry. As an all-in-one trust compliant accounting software (VRTrust) with full functioning general ledger, bank feeds and reconciliation, owner statements, portal, ACH payments and operational reporting, VRPlatform streamlines the monthly accounting process, ensuring more accurate owner statements and company financials.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-vrplat: Reservation and financial data flows from Lodgify into VRPlatform automatically.
Invoices are generated for each reservation, with revenue split between owner and manager.
Management fees are calculated based on Lodgify data and applied to each invoice.
Monthly owner statements are generated with only reconciled revenue included.
Payouts of reservations are auto-matched to the bank feed or uploaded CSV transactions.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-vrpla: VRPlatform will assist in setting up your account.
Copy your Lodgify API key and paste it into VRPlatform.
Done 🎉 All of your data will be imported from Lodgify.
marketplace.app-page.note-vrplatform: VRPlatform can be used anywhere, but may not meet certain local trust or statutory accounting requirements outside the US.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-hostkit: Automate your legal and fiscal obligations in Portugal
marketplace.app-page.about-hostkit: Hostkit automates all legal and fiscal obligations for short-term rentals (RNAL) and touristic developments (RNET) in Portugal. Certified invoicing for guests and property management, modelo 30, online check-in, SEF/AIMA, city tax, INE, COPE, digital guidebooks, smartlocks, expenses, current account, payments and more. Hostkit is a software certified by the Portuguese Tax Authority and has more than 70 integrations with complementary partners and services of the Portuguese government.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-hostki: Hostkit pulls property and reservation information from Lodgify in real-time via web-hooks.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-smartness: From dynamic pricing to marketing, boost your revenue with AI.
marketplace.app-page.about-smartness:
Smartness is the all-in-one platform for managing hotels, B&Bs, and vacation rentals, designed to be your operational partner. It doesn’t just provide data or streamline your work. It automates the key activities that drive your growth.

From revenue management to marketing, upselling, cross-selling, and guest communication, Smartness helps you achieve all your growth goals with ease.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-smartn: Smartness connects seamlessly through a direct integration and automatically syncs booking data from Lodgify.
Rates calculated by Smartness are pushed directly to Lodgify and reflect across all OTAs and channels.
Manage pricing for all of your Lodgify connected properties from one platform.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-techtape: Tech-enabled revenue management service for short-term rentals
marketplace.app-page.about-techtape: TechTape’s integration with Lodgify enables us to use the most accurate booking information as we analyze your revenue performance, and develop and implement a revenue strategy that is tailored to your unique goals and business needs. TechTape utilizes the best-in-class revenue management and data tools to deliver exceptional revenue performance for your short-term rental portfolio.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-techta: Automatically import your property and reservation information from Lodgify.
Create historic and future-looking data set of the performance of your properties.
Monitor and update performance data of your properties in real-time.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-welcomescre: Personalized TV welcome screen to enhance guest experience.
marketplace.app-page.about-welcomescreen:
WelcomeScreen is a digital signage solution for short-term rental hosts. Enhance your guest's check-in experience using WelcomeScreen's innovative TV app.

With WelcomeScreen, you can add a personalized message for each guest, share WiFi, emergency contact and local weather details with your guest, advertise local businesses and generate revenue, and promote direct bookings.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-homerunner: The first independent booking engine built for vacation rentals
marketplace.app-page.about-homerunner: HomeRunner is an independent booking engine that transforms WordPress vacation rental websites into professional direct booking platforms. With seamless API integration with Lodgify and Airbnb-quality user experience, operators gain complete control over their booking operation while reducing OTA dependency. Features include conversion tracking, guest screening, location-based collections, and mobile-optimized flows that turn websites into revenue-generating machines for vacation rental portfolios of any size.
marketplace.app-page.how-it-works-homeru: Syncs property data, availability, and pricing from Lodgify in real-time via API integration.
Booking confirmations and guest details automatically flow back to Lodgify for seamless property management.
Works with any WordPress website without requiring theme changes or rebuilding existing sites.
Guests book directly on your website with professional booking flows that rival major OTA platforms.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-homer: Book a call to get started on HomeRunner.
HomeRunner offers free personalized onboarding to help you set up your account.
Done 🎉 Start optimizing your direct booking site!
marketplace.app-page.note-homerunner: HomeRunner with Lodgify currently redirects to Lodgify's secure checkout system for payment processing and booking completion.
marketplace.app-page.tagline-houfy: Where OTA ease meets the book-direct vision, hosting reimagined
marketplace.app-page.about-houfy: Houfy.com is a visionary marketplace that combines the control of book-direct with the familiarity and options of an OTA. With no standardized service fees and no involvement in transactions, Houfy empowers hosts to manage payouts directly, earn more, and offer guests better deals by eliminating middleman costs. It’s a platform designed to maximize host independence and guest savings while fostering a transparent and flexible booking experience.
Listing data, pricing data, and availability is pulled from Lodgify.
Confirmed bookings are pushed back and managed through Lodgify.
marketplace.app-page.how-to-set-up-houfy: Sign in or create an account on Houfy.

marketplace.app-page.note-houfy: Hosts must have a Stripe or Square account to be able to collect direct payments from guests.

reviews.airbnb-reviews.automatic-reviews: Automate your reviews in seconds with Automated Reviews
Post reviews automatically after guest checkout to save time and boost your guest review response rate. Choose when they are sent and customize the review templates.
What can Automated Reviews do for you?
Save you time by posting guest reviews automatically after checkout.
Increase your chances of getting more guest reviews in return.
Maintain a strong host profile with consistent 5-star ratings.
Rotate between multiple review templates to keep messages varied.

marketplace.app-page.tagline-lake: Specializing in vacation rentals within a 15-minute drive of water
marketplace.app-page.about-lake: Lake.com specializes in lakehouses, mountain cabins, and vacation rentals on or near the water (islands and coasts included). Focusing on family, friendship, and experiencing the natural world, Lake.com blends tradition with technology, offering a return to the simple pleasures of life for families vacationing in the great outdoors.
